# CoffeeDomainLive

> **Service Layer**

```ts
const CoffeeDomainLive: Layer<
  | GetCoffeesService
| GetACoffeeService, never, never>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts:55](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts#L55)

Composed [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) providing all coffee domain services with their
repository dependency already satisfied.

## Remarks

Construction proceeds in two steps:

1. [Layer.mergeAll](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) combines `GetCoffeesService.Default` and
   `GetACoffeeService.Default` into a single layer that requires
   `CoffeeRepository`.
2. [Layer.provide](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) feeds [InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../../repository/coffee-repository/variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md) into
   that combined layer, eliminating the repository requirement.

The resulting layer has no unsatisfied dependencies and can be handed
directly to [ManagedRuntime.make](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) for use in the MCP server
startup sequence.

## Example

```ts
import { ManagedRuntime } from "effect";
import { CoffeeDomainLive } from "./domain.js";

const runtime = ManagedRuntime.make(CoffeeDomainLive);
```
